name: @omadia/plugin-privacy-detector-presidio
description: Presidio-backed PII detector plugin for the Privacy-Proxy. Registers a `privacy.detector@1` provider that uses Microsoft Presidio (spaCy NER + pattern recognizers) via a Python sidecar — deterministic, ms-fast Names/Addresses/Org detection plus structured PII (Email/IBAN/Phone/Credit-Card/IDs) with country-specific validation. Complements the regex detector in `harness-plugin-privacy-guard` and the Ollama NER detector in `harness-plugin-privacy-detector-ollama` (Slice 3.4).
